My return flight from Santorini (JTR) to Athens departs 14:35 and arrives 16:30 EEST, so I need to be checked out and at the port/airport transfer by 10:30. My lodging is Blue Caldera Guesthouse, Finikia, Oia, 84702 Santorini, Greece and the guesthouse contact is Maria Papadopoulos, +30 22860 28123, maria@bluecaldera.gr. I have mild right-knee osteoarthritis — I can handle short rocky descents (about 10–15 minutes) but not long steep climbs and I prefer pack weight ≤12 kg. Please turn my GPX waypoints into a practical sunrise plan: exact timing for sunrise/blue/golden hours per waypoint, transport/parking/access notes, safety and alternatives if access is blocked, a gear/battery checklist and charging plan, and a short morning itinerary I can follow so I’ll be back in time for checkout and my transfer.
